entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop studied for its response to agroclimatological factors.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: An agroclimatological factor that affects crop phenology and growth processes.

entities.name: HUMIDITY
entities.description: An agroclimatological factor that influences phenology indirectly via soil water depletion.

entities.name: SOIL-WATER DEFICITS
entities.description: A condition of water scarcity in the soil affecting groundnut response.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The climatic region where the groundnut model is applicable.

entities.name: CONTROLLED-ENVIRONMENT FACILITIES
entities.description: Facilities used to obtain information for modeling groundnut response in the SAT.

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The application of water to crops, affecting phenology.

entities.name: RAINFALL DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The pattern of precipitation affecting crop phenology.

entities.name: CROP PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The timing of biological events in the crop's life cycle.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of agricultural production per unit area.

entities.name: DAYLENGTH
entities.description: The duration of daylight, which affects phenology based on genotypic variation.

entities.name: GENOTYPIC VARIATION
entities.description: Differences in genetic makeup that influence responses to daylength.

entities.name: SATURATION DEFICIT
entities.description: A measure of the dryness of the air, influencing water depletion in soil.

entities.name: WATER-DEPLETION RATE
entities.description: The rate at which water is removed from the soil, affecting phenology.

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The period of the year with significant rainfall, affecting the growing period.

entities.name: GROWING PERIOD
entities.description: The duration of time the crop is actively growing.

entities.name: GROWTH PROCESSES
entities.description: Biological processes related to the development and increase in size of the crop.

entities.name: PARTITIONING OF DRY MATTER TO PODS
entities.description: The allocation of biomass to the reproductive organs of the groundnut.

entities.name: CROP-WEATHER INVESTIGATIONS
entities.description: Studies that integrate phenology and growth processes to understand weather impacts.
